sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52201" key="kakoqelh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰκο-θελής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n52201.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">malevolent</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Adam.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
